headline: Can Coinbase (COIN) Turn Legal Scrutiny Into Stronger Governance Without Diluting Its Crypto Edge?
summary: In early April 2026, Coinbase Global, Inc. disclosed that director Paul Clement will not seek re-election at the 2026 Annual Meeting, prompting the Board to plan a reduction from ten to nine members, while a separate lawsuit in New York alleges the company helped facilitate illegal online gambling involving a minor through crypto transactions and influencer-driven marketing. The combination of a board reshuffle and fresh legal scrutiny around underage gambling exposure highlights how...
